name: SurgePays, Inc.
summary: SurgePays, Inc. is a financial technology and telecommunications company operating as an MVNO and fintech platform provider. It offers subsidized wireless services via Lifeline through brands SurgePhone Wireless and Torch Wireless, prepaid wireless plans via LinkUp Mobile, prepaid top-up transaction services at convenience stores and bodegas, and ClearLine, a SaaS point-of-sale marketing platform. The company also operates as an MVNE following a 2024 agreement with AT&T, providing SIM provisioning, billing, and airtime to other wireless providers.

products.name: SurgePhone Wireless
products.description: Subsidized prepaid wireless service targeting underserved communities via Lifeline program.

products.name: Torch Wireless
products.description: Subsidized prepaid wireless brand serving underserved communities through federal Lifeline program.

products.name: LinkUp Mobile
products.description: Prepaid wireless plans with no-contract, unlimited talk and text sold via convenience store SIM kits.

products.name: SurgePays Prepaid Wireless Top-Ups
products.description: POS platform enabling convenience store clerks to process top-ups for major wireless brands, debit and gift card activations.

products.name: ClearLine
products.description: Patent-pending SaaS touchscreen application transforming POS terminals into in-store marketing, loyalty, and QR code engagement tools.

products.name: MVNE Platform
products.description: Mobile Virtual Network Enabler offering SIM provisioning, billing, and airtime to third-party wireless providers without direct carrier relationships.

partnerships.description: Multi-year agreement signed November 2024 providing direct access to AT&T's nationwide 4G LTE and 5G network, enabling MVNE operations.
